title: Jira Ticket State Polling
content:
Use Jira Incident State Polling as a sub-playbook when required to pause the execution of a master playbook until the Jira ticket state is either resolved or closed.
This playbook implements polling by continuously running the jira-get-issue command until the state is either resolved or closed.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Jira, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — TicketId: The Jira TicketId  to poll for its state.; Interval: Frequency that the polling command will run (minutes).; Timeout: Amount of time to poll before declaring a timeout and resuming the playbook (in minutes).; InstanceName: Set the Jira Instance that will be used by the polling command.
Only relevant when there is more than one Jira instance.; AdditionalPollingCommandName: Additional polling commands are relevant when using StatePolling, and there is more than one Jira instance. It will specify the polling command to use a specific instance to run on. 
When implemented, add "Using" to the value. 
The polling command will then take the instance name as the instance to use..

Integrations/scripts used: PrintErrorEntry, RunPollingCommand, ScheduleGenericPolling.
